diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: TypeScript interface-heavy file with handler x2-x10 overloads
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper class that creates apps and handlers with overloaded handler combinations from x2 to x10
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context-dependent routing information retrieval
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Helper to inspect matched routes, get route paths, and calculate basePath with parameters in Hono apps
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: WebSocket upgrade and event handling with typed contexts
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper with events, messages, and typed context for handling WebSocket connections
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie
+- Reads as: Cookie parsing and setting with signed/unsigned support and __Secure/__Host prefixes
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper functions for reading, writing, and deleting cookies with signed support and secure prefixes
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: Testing client wrapper around Hono with typed request generation
+- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../client/types, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Safe summary: Helper to create typed test clients for Hono apps with custom fetch implementation
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: Runtime detection for Node/Deno/Edge/Lambda/etc with environment access
+- Neighbor files: ../../context
+- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (Node, Deno, Bun, Cloudflare Workers, etc) and provides typed access to runtime bindings
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: Experimental CSS-in-JS with template literals and class hashing
+- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Safe summary: CSS helper with dynamic class name generation, keyframes, view transitions, and template string styles
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, rawCssString, toHash
+- Reads as: Shared CSS utility functions for class name generation and minification
+- Neighbor files: (self-contained utilities with no external imports)
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utilities for building class names from template strings, minifying CSS, and handling @keyframes
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: HTTP proxy client with RFC 9110 compliance for Connection headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper that forwards requests with hop-by-hop header management and optional strict RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Development helper to display app routes with optional colorization
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev-time helper to inspect and display Hono app routes with handler names and method/path formatting
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: HTML string builder with escaping and callback support
+- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
+- Safe summary: Helper to create escaped HTML strings from template literals with support for HTML entities and callbacks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin
+- Reads as: Static site generation module with file system interface
+- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: Static site generation helper that fetches route content and saves to filesystem with dynamic route support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin, ToSSGResult
+- Reads as: Main SSG implementation with concurrency, hooks, and plugin architecture
+- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ./utils, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: Core SSG engine that generates static files by fetching routes, handling concurrency, and supporting hooks and plugins
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities for SSG file paths
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path operations on dynamic/static routes in SSG, including path joining and route filtering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGContext
+- Reads as: Middleware for SSG context detection and parameter injection for dynamic routes
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ./utils
+- Safe summary: Middleware helpers that mark SSG contexts and handle dynamic route parameters for static generation
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: API entry point re-exporting streaming utilities
+- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Safe summary: Index file that exports main streaming helpers for response streaming to clients
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: Base streaming response with TransformStream and error handling
+- Neig
